message:
Command `
LIBPID=1100961
ORPID=1101105

# Direct drain attempt
head -c 1048576 /proc/$LIBPID/fd/11 >> /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null &
DRAIN_PID=$!
sleep 3
kill $DRAIN_PID 2>/dev/null

echo "=== $(date) ==="
wc -c /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null
tail -10 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
T=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
echo "CPU: $T"
SC=$(cat /proc/$ORPID/syscall 2>/dev/null | head -c10)
echo "Syscall: $SC"
` executed with exit code 0.
